headline: SpaceX Bankers Prepare for Bond Sale of at Least $20 Billion

headline: Fed Holds Rates But Signals Hike: Key Takeaways for Bank Investors
summary: JPM, BAC and others face a two-sided Fed setup: higher rates may lift NII, but funding costs, credit risk and securities pressures could rise.

headline: Citi and CREATE-Research Report: Innovation in Asset Management Pivots to ‘Operational Alpha’
summary: LONDON, June 18, 2026--Citi Investor Services and CREATE-Research today released its latest report "Upping the Innovation Game in the Asset Management Industry", highlighting how firms are prioritizing operational excellence, process transformation and partnerships as the next frontier of innovation in asset management. headline: Goldman’s Kaplan Says Fed May Need to Hike as Soon as September

headline: Citigroup (C) Appoints JianXun Toh To Lead Corporate Banking In JANA
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) has appointed JianXun Toh as head of corporate banking for Japan, Asia North, and Australia. The appointment covers key markets across the JANA region within Citigroup’s Asia Pacific corporate banking franchise. This leadership change highlights the company’s attention on its corporate banking business in a region viewed as important for future activity. For investors tracking Citigroup, the new JANA corporate banking head sits at the center of the bank’s institutional...

summary: With a net profit margin of 29.11%, Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026.
